so that it is representative of each state’s data in 
MMLEADS, and within the state it is representative of the underlying distribution of MME_TYPE_CD. 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 8 

SOURCE: CCW (derived) 

VALUES: 0 = not included in sample 
1 = included in 1% sample 

COMMENT: Since the MMLEADS files are very large, CCW developed this variable and includes it in MMLEADS as a 
simple way to test analytic code — or conduct exploratory analyses using a small subset of data.
